title: Craftable Iron Horse Armour
body:
# Craftable Iron Horse Armour

**Suit Up Your Steed — No Dungeon Required**

Let’s be honest: Iron Horse Armor is cool, but finding it? Not so much. This datapack lets you craft it yourself — no chests, no luck, just pure crafting freedom.

Note: “Iron Horse Armor Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack.If your are interested in more Datapacks Check out the links at the end of the description.

**🧠 Why It’s Better:**
Because your horse deserves protection too. Whether you're charging into battle, exploring the wild, or just want your mount to look like a tank, this pack gives you the gear without the grind.

**📦 How to Use:**

1. Download the .zip
   
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
   
3. Type /reload in-game
   
4. Craft your Iron Horse Armor and ride in style
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
